generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about defense - it's about protecting our way of life. As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vulnerable we are when we rely too much on others. We need to invest in our own capabilities to ensure we're never caught off guard. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
